2207810.name: Quaxum
2207810.description:
A New Space Age! 

A retro arcade space shooter brings about the new age of color and mayhem! 

Protect the Planetary Defense Shield (PDS) from the onslaught of the alien Klaxxack invasion. 
Manage your energy cards as they power the PDS and buy you those sweet power ups!

Balance between keeping your shield powered and buying upgrades to clear the screen of aliens.   

Defend, shoot, and win! 

Features:

Come get your ship upgrades. Get new armor and abilities as you progress through the game.  

Examples: 

  • Increase HP! Survive just that much longer. 

  • Cloud Warping! Drop a cloud anywhere, and jump right back to it when danger nears! Dodging those pesky enemies.  

 Power up your attacks with a multitude of special weapons. 

  • Drill: Drill Baby Drill! Cut through a line of enemies.

  • Bombs: Bombs away! Push around those bombs until you find that sweet spot of explosion mayhem

Arrow Heads: Got a crowd control problem? Spread the love of arrows in all directions. Takes care of that. 

 And many more! 

Ranking System:

  • Kill and gather your Zero Quantum Field (ZQF) energy cards to rank up! The more cards, the more you grow in rank in the Space Corps. 

  • New Rank Insignia as you move up the ranks.

  • Unlock gear and abilities as you move up! So get those bars, they just might save your life. 


    What's that? Ohhhh! The sound of the Invading Klaxxack Army! 

Enemies.

The bane of the galaxy's existence. And it is your job to eradicate the plague and save the galaxy. 

Goes with the job as the last knight of the galaxy. 

  • 8 Enemy Types (Maybe a few surprises)

  • Bosses! Who doesn't love taking down the big bads of an invading army? 

  • Multiple obstacle baddies (Ones that don't damage the PDS, but will damage you!)

Each level is a wave of enemies and baddies surging on you and the Planetary Defense Shield. How long can you last? 

Modes?

OH Yeah. We have those! 

We got a few to choose from.

  • Arcade: 50 levels of nonstop space shooting action. No stopping, except for those quick bathroom breaks, even a knight needs to go. 

  • Future Mode: 50 levels with a save system. Come back anytime to take on the galaxy's problem, at your pace. 

  • Cosmic Mode: Randomly generated levels! Play through the game with a stream of new levels that change every time! 

  • And...Some Secret ones! 

Oh.....And some secrets along the way.....

Seriously, remember those good old days were you scoured and played every nook and cranny of the game looking for everything? Well maybe you don't, but you will need to here to get everything out of the game! 

Story:

The last Knight of the Qauxum Space Corps, is tasked with taking of the invading Klaxxack army. Using the state of art Planetary Defense Shield (PDS), the knight must deploy the shield to defend the planets and sectors of the galaxy under threat from the army. He travels the galaxy looking for the King of the Klaxxack army with intent to destroy him and end the onslaught to the galaxy. 

 The last knight is the final hope for the galaxy as the Quaxum Space Corps has fallen into disarray from years of fending off the various threats that have plagued the Sunrix galaxy. Their Research & Development department has finally created the Planetary Defense Shield technology in the desperate need to defend the planet and galaxy but they only managed to create one prototype before the planet was destroyed by the Klaxxack army. 

The last knight is given the prototype and sets off to save what's left of the galaxy. This is where you, the player come in. Take on the role and defend the galaxy! 

GOODIES!!!

With every purchase you get a bundle of goodies! 

  • Digital Manual: Just like the SNES era, a full manual detailing the lore (With Pictures!), details, and hints. 

  • Novella: A novella from the point of view of the Knight as he begins to learn of the the Klaxxack army and prepares to take them on, leading up to the game! 

  • Album Soundtrack: The album soundtrack! With music from and inspired by the game! 

A New Space Age Is Upon Us! 

Come relive those retro arcade days but now with more color and mayhem!
